title: taraxacum oreades
intro: Taraxacum oreades, also known as the Welsh dandelion or mountain dandelion, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion genus that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its roots and leaves are used to treat digestive issues, such as constipation and indigestion, due to its high content of inulin and other compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum oreades include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in reducing pain and swelling, as well as its potential to support liver and kidney function. Taraxacum oreades can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support digestive health.
